title: Best Freestanding Bathtubs of 2026: 7 Soaking Tubs Tested & Reviewed
summary: We researched 39 freestanding bathtubs to find the best soaking tubs of 2026. The WOODBRIDGE 59" acrylic tub leads our picks, with options from $405 to $2,599.
